chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Criminal Bail Application No.D-04 of 2019 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on M.A 258/19 2. For orders on office objection 3. For orders on M.A 259/19 4. For hearing of main case 15.01.2019 Mr. Inder Jeet D. Lohano, Advocate for applicants alongwith applicants. 1. Granted. 2. Overruled. 3. Granted. 4. It is, inter alia, contended that applicants’ names do not appear in the F.I.R. however, subsequently during investigation they have been arraigned and their names appear in the challan as accused; that the applicants intend to appear before the trial court for seeking remedy as provided under the law but need protection of this court as the N.B.Ws have been issued against them. Without touching the merits of the case, the applicants are admitted to protective bail for a period of eight days from today subject to their furnishing a solvent surety in the sum of Rs.25,000/- each and P.R Bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of Additional Registrar of this Court. This order shall cease to have its effect on expiry of 08 days on 22.01.2019 or on surrender of the applicants before the concerned Court, whichever is earlier. The bail application stands disposed of. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
